% Extensive margin: selection into playing (auto-generated)
\begin{table}[htbp]
  \centering
  \caption{Extensive margin: contract status and the probability of playing.}
  \label{tab:extensive}
  \begin{tabular}{llrr}
    \toprule
    Specification & Outcome & Estimate & $p$ \\
    \midrule
    \multicolumn{4}{l}{\textit{Panel A. Full panel (Transfermarkt outcomes)}} \\
    Spell $+$ league\,$\times$\,month & Played (Bosman)      & $+2.3$\,pp  & ${<}0.0001$   \\
    Spell $+$ league\,$\times$\,month & Played (0--6m bin)   & $+14.0$\,pp & ${<}0.0001$ \\
    \midrule
    \multicolumn{4}{l}{\textit{Panel B. Within teammates (club\,$\times$\,month FE)}} \\
    Spell $+$ club\,$\times$\,month & Played              & $+1.2$\,pp  & $0.013$ \\
    Spell $+$ club\,$\times$\,month & Minutes             & $+0.5$      & $0.82$   \\
    Spell $+$ club\,$\times$\,month & Mean rating         & $+0.001$    & $0.94$   \\
    Spell $+$ club\,$\times$\,month & Minutes-wtd.\ rating & $+0.003$    & $0.85$   \\
    \bottomrule
  \end{tabular}

  \vspace{4pt}
  {\footnotesize\itshape Note: playing-probability effects survive every FE
  structure; residual mean-rating movements reflect the mechanical minutes
  channel and vanish in the minutes-weighted rating and among regulars.\par}
